title: nautilocalyx lynchii
intro: Nautilocalyx lynchii, also known as the "Lynchi's nautilocalyx," is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae, native to Mexico. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The health benefits of Nautilocalyx lynchii include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are typically used in traditional folk medicine.
